question.title: Disable HttpClient Wire Logging
question.body:
I would like to disable Wire class debug information, I have the following log4j.properties file

log4j.rootLogger=DEBUG, console, file

log4j.org.apache.http.wire=ERROR

log4j.appender.console=org.apache.log4j.ConsoleAppender
log4j.appender.console.layout=org.apache.log4j.PatternLayout
log4j.appender.console.layout.ConversionPattern=%d [%t] %-5p %c: %L - %m%n

log4j.appender.file=org.apache.log4j.RollingFileAppender
log4j.appender.file.File=LogFile.log
log4j.appender.file.layout=org.apache.log4j.PatternLayout
log4j.appender.file.layout.conversionPattern=%d [%t] %-5p %c: %L - %m%n

I have slf4j, log4j and commons logging jars in my class path.
